questions.q: What is the primary role of an Ingress Controller in a Kubernetes cluster?
options: To act as a reverse proxy and load balancer routing external HTTP/HTTPS traffic to internal Services
To manage the deployment rolling updates
questions.explanation: Ingress is a collection of routing rules that require an Ingress Controller (like NGINX or Traefik) running in the cluster to act as the actual load balancer/reverse proxy to route external requests to internal Services.
